framework.name: iso_iec_42001
framework.description: ISO/IEC 42001:2023 — international management-system standard for Artificial Intelligence. Establishes requirements for an AIMS (AI Management System) within an organization.

controls.name: clause-4
controls.description: Determine external and internal issues, interested parties, and the scope of the AIMS.

controls.name: clause-5
controls.description: Top management demonstrates leadership and commitment with respect to the AIMS.

controls.name: clause-6
controls.description: Plan actions to address AI risks and opportunities; AI objectives are established.

controls.name: clause-7
controls.description: Resources, competence, awareness, communication, and documented information needed for the AIMS.

controls.name: clause-8
controls.description: Plan, implement and control processes to meet AIMS requirements; operate AI systems within defined parameters.

controls.name: clause-9
controls.description: Monitor, measure, analyze, and evaluate the AIMS; internal audit and management review.

controls.name: clause-10
controls.description: Address nonconformities and continually improve the suitability, adequacy, and effectiveness of the AIMS.
